name: Guiding Bolt
description: A flash of light streaks toward a creature of your choice within range. Make a ranged spell attack against the target. On a hit, the target takes 4d6 radiant damage, and the next attack roll made against this target before the end of your next turn has advantage.
notes: Range: D&D 5e 120 ft; 4 grid (60 ft) for L1 range balance.
On-hit advantage-next-attack secondary effect requires a linked-attack-bonus engine mechanic — see proposals.
4d6 radiant is the highest L1 damage (avg 14). Mana 3 warranted.
Stub had blessed-incense×2+holy-water (three components, over-taxing). Reduced to blessed-incense×1; amulet provides it free for clerics.

material_component.focus_provided: Amulet provides unlimited blessed-incense (free for clerics with amulet).
